news.summary: Enhances financial position by improving the balance sheet and securing capital for growth initiatives. This move significantly boosts the company's financial stability and provides adequate funds for expansion. The injection of capital is expected to catalyze growth and enhance operational capabilities. This strategic decision aims to position the company for future success and drive profitability. The specific amount of capital received and the impact on the balance sheet were not disclosed.
news.headline: NeurAxis raises $5.0M in registered direct offering, bolstering balance sheet and growth capital.

news.summary: A voice-controlled application developed by Lundy in Sacramento, California, is enabling MetroList subscribers to gather property information on the spot. This innovative app allows users to verbally input property details during home visits.
news.headline: Lundy-powered app enables MetroList agents to streamline listings by using voice commands to collect property data on-site.

news.summary: In Atlantic City, the renowned Tropicana Atlantic City casino resort is set to unveil the all-new Solana Tower, located in the west wing. The project is scheduled to begin later this year and is projected to be completed by early 2026. With a total of 604 rooms and suites being redesigned, this initiative aims to enhance the guest experience and solidify Tropicana's position as a top destination for visitors seeking the ultimate escape.
news.headline: Tropicana Atlantic City to debut all-new Solana Tower, 604 rooms, expected to be completed in early 2026.

news.summary: In response to a recent ban on Bitcoin mining in southern regions imposed by Russia, a company has decided to repurpose its previous oil production infrastructure. This decision was made as a strategic move to adapt to the changing regulatory environment. The ban affected numerous regions in the south where Bitcoin mining was previously active. The company's shift towards repurposing old oil production infrastructure showcases a proactive approach to navigating the evolving regulatory landscape surrounding cryptocurrency mining.
news.headline: Russia may move Bitcoin miners to north due to a ban on mining in the south; plans to use old oil facilities for this.

news.summary: In Boise, Idaho on May 21, 2025, Jitasa, a B Corp specializing in accounting and bookkeeping services for nonprofits, revealed a new brand film created in collaboration with BBC StoryWorks Commercial Productions. The film, sponsored by B Lab Global, showcases Jitasa's commitment to supporting nonprofit organizations.

news.summary: Shares of Lightspeed Commerce Inc (NYSE: LSPD) are down following the company's Q4 report, which showed revenue of $253.42 million, just under the expected $253.86 million. Adjusted earnings were 10 cents per share, below the estimated 11 cents per share. Total revenue saw a 10% increase from the previous year, with transaction-based revenue up by 14% and subscription revenue by 8%. Lightspeed Commerce Inc's stock is trading lower as a result of these figures. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Lightspeed Commerce (LSPD) Q4 revenue $253.42M missed estimates; shares slide. 10% YoY revenue increase.

news.summary: Loveland, Colorado - Livmark Communities, in collaboration with Hillside Commercial Group, introduces the latest stage of The Bend at Highland Meadows on May 15, 2025. This innovative build-for-rent (BTR) development aims to enhance the quality of contemporary living in the area.
news.headline: Livmark Communities announces new phase of The Bend at Highland Meadows in Loveland, Colorado to elevate modern living standards. Character count: 113

news.summary: Dinova Inc., a company specializing in business dining, has recently released a new guide tailored for corporate travelers and teams. This guide showcases healthy dining options available through their preferred dining program. Released on May 22, 2025, in Atlanta, Dinova aims to support business diners in maintaining their wellness routines while on work-related trips. By focusing on healthy choices, they are empowering corporate travelers to prioritize their well-being, no matter where their work may lead them.
news.headline: Dinova's new dining guide caters to corporate travelers, featuring healthy options from its program to promote smarter choices.

news.headline: Lucosky Brookman LLP and Spartan Capital Securities LLC host 11th charity event for Save a Child's Heart Foundation.

news.summary: In New York, research from KBRA reveals a slowdown in April retail sales and employment growth due to trade policy uncertainty, leading to cautious consumer spending and market instability. Recent reports highlight stable retail sales and job growth in March amidst fluctuating trade tensions affecting markets. KBRA also examines the potential effects of tariffs on municipal credit. Stay updated with Van Hesser’s insights on credit through KBRA's weekly podcast. KBRA, a leading credit rating agency, continues to analyze these trends.
news.headline: KBRA research shows retail sales slumped in April due to trade policy uncertainty, unsettling consumers.

Please note that the information in the document should not be released, published, or distributed in any location where it is unlawful to do so.
news.headline: Sodexo Inc. sets pricing terms for cash tender offer for certain USD notes. Announcement made on May 22, 2025.

news.summary: Midway through Thursday's trading session, U.S. stocks saw gains, with the Dow Jones index increasing by approximately 0.2%. The Dow was up by 0.17% to 41,932.94, while the NASDAQ climbed by 0.66% to 18,997.89, and the S&P 500 rose by 0.20% to 5,856.28. Communication services shares experienced a 1.2% increase, while utilities stocks saw a 1.9% decline. Initial jobless claims in the U.S. decreased by 2,000 from the previous week to 227,000 in the week ending May 17, surpassing market estimates of 230,000. In specific equities trading, Vigil Neuroscience, Inc. (NASDAQ: VIGL) shares surged by 242% to $7.91 following Sanofi's announcement of acquiring the company for about $600 million. Additionally, Navitas Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ: NVTS) witnessed a 130% surge to $4.3988 after NVIDIA's selection of the company.
news.headline: Dow gains 0.17% to 41,932.94, NASDAQ rises 0.66% to 18,997.89, S&P 500 up 0.20% to 5,856.28; US initial jobless claims fall to 227,000.

news.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) saw a significant drop in its stock price following the release of its fiscal first-quarter 2025 results. The company reported total revenue of $1.73 billion, marking a 4.2% increase from the previous year and surpassing Wall Street's projected $1.67 billion. Comparable brand revenue also showed growth, rising by 3.4% year over year. However, the adjusted earnings per share of $1.56 fell short of the analyst consensus of $1.76. The retailer reported a gross margin of 44.3%, a decline of 360 basis points from the prior year. This included a 300-basis-point benefit from a freight adjustment in the same quarter of 2024. The adjusted gross margin also decreased by 60 basis points compared to the previous year, mainly due to a 220-basis-point decrease in merchandise margins, partially offset by 120 basis points of supply chain efficiencies. Visit Benzinga.com for more details.
news.headline: Williams-Sonoma absorbs tariff costs, revenue soars to $1.73B, up 4.2%; misses EPS at $1.56 vs est. $1.76. Gross margin down to 44.3%.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Dallas, the directors at Lennox, a prominent company in energy-efficient climate control solutions listed on NYSE as LII, sanctioned a 13% rise in the quarterly dividend. This increase takes the dividend from $1.15 to $1.30 per share of common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on July 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded as...
news.headline: Lennox raises quarterly dividend by 13% to $1.30 per share, payable July 15, 2025, to stockholders.

news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland, on May 22, 2025, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) provided an update on its ongoing discussions to acquire IC’ALPS SAS ("IC’ALPS") in a deal that would involve purchasing all of its shares and voting rights. IC’ALPS is a specialist in designing and supplying Application-Specific Integrated Circuits ("ASICs") and is headquartered in Grenoble, France. SEALSQ, a company focusing on Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, is in exclusive negotiations for this acquisition. No financial terms were disclosed regarding the deal.
news.headline: SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) to acquire 100% of IC'ALPS, an ASIC design specialist in Grenoble, France.

news.summary: Barclays analyst David Strauss has started covering Intuitive Machines (NASDAQ: LUNR) with an Equal-Weight rating and a price target of $13. The rating indicates positivity towards the company's various growth opportunities, tempered by concerns regarding government funding, competition within the industry, and operational hurdles. Strauss believes that Intuitive Machines stands to benefit from NASA's increasing reliance on private sector collaborators. The company holds a strategic position in NASA's initiatives for lunar exploration, contributing to lunar landers, data transfer, and surface operations. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Intuitive Machines aims for $500M revenue by 2028, targets positive EBITDA in 2026, says analyst.

news.summary: Cole Haan, a well-known American brand recognized for its timeless designs and innovative approach, is set to launch its golf apparel line in spring 2026. This exciting debut will be followed by the introduction of racket equipment and performance lifestyle products. The announcement was made on May 22, 2025, in New York. Cole Haan's foray into golf apparel signifies a strategic expansion for the brand, which is expected to attract a significant audience of sports enthusiasts and fashion-forward consumers. Stay tuned for more updates on this exclusive launch from Cole Haan.
news.headline: Cole Haan partners with Catapult Group to launch performance apparel; Golf Apparel debut in Spring 2026.

news.summary: In Washington D.C. on May 22, 2025, Gloria Browne-Marshall, an Emmy-award winner and accomplished author, is set to present her latest book, titled A Protest History of the United States, at the upcoming Headliners Book Event. The event is scheduled for Thursday, May 29 at 6 p.m. Interested individuals can secure tickets to the event through the provided link.
news.headline: Emmy-winner Gloria Browne-Marshall to discuss her book at National Press Club on May 29 at 6pm. Tickets available.

news.summary: On Thursday, May 22, 2025, in Saint Helier, Jersey, CoinShares International Limited, a prominent global investment firm in digital assets, disclosed an agreement to engage in a block transaction. The company, listed on Nasdaq Stockholm Market as CS and on US OTCQX as CNSRF, will be acquiring 200,000 ordinary shares from a shareholder.
news.headline: CoinShares agrees to buy 200,000 shares from shareholder in block transaction.

news.summary: The Executives' Club of Chicago recently disclosed the selection of Dorri McWhorter as the incoming President & CEO, starting from June 2, 2025. With over twenty years of experience, McWhorter is recognized as a prominent leader and organizer within the community.
news.headline: Dorri McWhorter appointed President & CEO of Executives' Club of Chicago, effective June 2, 2025. Celebrated leader with 2 decades of experience.
